overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a young girl sitting on a wooden dock at night, holding a lantern. A mysterious silhouetted figure emerges from the mist and approaches across the waterfront, passing industrial buildings and dim streetlights in the background.

agents.ego_description: young girl sits on the dock edge holding a lantern, gazing out at the misty water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock surface extending toward the water
calm water surface reflecting distant lights with mist hovering above
dark silhouettes of industrial warehouses and structures across the water
warm orange lights glowing in the distance beyond the water
metal railings running along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: A static, atmospheric scene on a wooden waterfront dock at night. A young girl sits at the edge holding a lantern, facing a misty harbor with industrial buildings and distant lights visible across the water. The environment is still and devoid of movement.

events.description: mysterious silhouetted figure emerges from the mist in the distance and begins walking toward the dock
figure passes by the seated girl at close range and continues walking past the camera

agents.ego_description: girl remains seated but turns slightly to watch the approaching figure, holding the lantern steady

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking steadily from the distant mist toward the foreground, passing the seated girl

segments.scene_description: The quiet atmosphere is broken as a mysterious silhouetted figure emerges from the mist and walks steadily toward the dock. The stranger passes by the seated girl, who watches the approach with lantern in hand, while the industrial waterfront remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a transition from a moment of profound stillness to one of mysterious encounter on a nocturnal waterfront. It begins with a static view of a young girl sitting at the edge of a wooden dock, her lantern casting a soft glow against a misty harbor filled with distant industrial buildings. As the silence lingers, the atmosphere shifts when a silhouetted figure emerges from the dense fog, walking steadily toward the foreground. The camera remains focused on the scene as the stranger passes by the seated girl, who watches the approach while the dim lights of the industrial waterfront loom in the background.
